title: Count Distinct Numbers on Board
titleCn: 统计桌面上的不同数字

testcases.input: n = 5 Output: 4 Explanation: Initially, 5 is present on the board. The next day, 2 and 4 will be added since 5 % 2 == 1 and 5 % 4 == 1. After that day, 3 will be added to the board because 4 % 3 == 1. At the end of a billion days, the distinct numbers on the board will be 2, 3, 4, and 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: Initially, 5 is present on the board. The next day, 2 and 4 will be added since 5 % 2 == 1 and 5 % 4 == 1. After that day, 3 will be added to the board because 4 % 3 == 1. At the end of a billion days, the distinct numbers on the board will be 2, 3, 4, and 5.

testcases.input: n = 3 Output: 2 Explanation: Since 3 % 2 == 1, 2 will be added to the board. After a billion days, the only two distinct numbers on the board are 2 and 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Since 3 % 2 == 1, 2 will be added to the board. After a billion days, the only two distinct numbers on the board are 2 and 3.
